name: Mike Torres
bio: Mike is a nationally certified strength and conditioning specialist with over 12 years of coaching experience. He has helped hundreds of clients achieve their body transformation goals.

name: Jennifer Lee
bio: Jennifer brings a holistic approach to fitness, combining yoga, mindfulness, and movement science. Her classes focus on both physical and mental well-being.

name: Carlos Mendez
bio: Carlos is an elite CrossFit coach known for his high-energy classes and results-driven training programs. His HIIT sessions are legendary for calorie burning.

name: Priya Kapoor
bio: Priya specializes in helping women achieve their fitness and weight management goals through evidence-based nutrition and fun, effective workout programs.

name: Ryan Walsh
bio: Ryan is a competitive bodybuilder and certified trainer specializing in hypertrophy training and competition preparation. He has guided 20+ clients to the competition stage.

name: Sophia Kim
bio: Sophia makes fitness fun! Her high-energy dance fitness and cardio classes attract members of all ages. She believes working out should feel like a celebration.
